zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Avenall於1450年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親John Avenell67歲，母親Johanna Margaret Massey22歲。她與Roger Holcombe在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年4月7日在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Avenall于1450年出生在英国英格兰时，她的父亲John Avenell67岁，母亲Johanna Margaret Massey22岁。她与Roger Holcombe在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年4月7日在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Avenall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Avenell
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Avenel, a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Avo. The surname was later confused with Averill .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Avenall was born in 1450, in England, United Kingdom, her father, John Avenell, was 67 and her mother, Johanna Margaret Massey, was 22. She married Roger Holcombe in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 7 April 1499, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Avenall est née en 1450, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Avenell, avait 67 ans et sa mère, Johanna Margaret Massey, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Holcombe à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 avril 1499, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Avenall 1450 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Avenell 67 und ihre Mutter Johanna Margaret Massey 22. Sie hat in Devon, England Roger Holcombe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. April 1499 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Avenall è nata il nel 1450 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Avenell, aveva 67 anni e sua madre, Johanna Margaret Massey, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Roger Holcombe nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 7 aprile 1499, nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Avenallが1450年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父John Avenellは67歳，母Johanna Margaret Masseyは22歳であった。イギリスデボンでRoger Holcombeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年4月7日にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Avenall(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Avenell(은)는 67세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Johanna Margaret Massey(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 영국 데폰에서 Roger Holcombe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 4월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Avenall nasceu em 1450, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Avenell, tinha 67 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Margaret Massey, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Holcombe em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de abril de 1499, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Avenall родилась в 1450 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Avenell было 67 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Margaret Massey, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Holcombe в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 7 апреля 1499 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Avenall nació en 1450, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Avenell, tenía 67 años y su mamá, Johanna Margaret Massey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Roger Holcombe en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 7 de abril de 1499, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
